name: environmental_health_municipal_bond_marrowbridge_rig_utl
premise: A Environmental Health response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving environmental health municipal bond marrowbridge rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Elena Bennett
agents.identity: I am Elena Bennett, accountable for a defensible call in Environmental Health when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Mateo Serrano
agents.identity: I am Mateo Serrano, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Environmental Health.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Elena Bennett must decide under rights vs utility. What does Elena Bennett do?
